twilio.initSnippet: const twilio = require('twilio'); const client = twilio(process.env.TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, process.env.TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN);
twilio.exampleSnippet: await client.messages.create({ from: process.env.TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER, to: '+15559876543', body: 'Hello from ThinkDrop' });

sendgrid.exampleSnippet: await sgMail.send({ to, from, subject, text });

mailgun.initSnippet: const Mailgun = require('mailgun.js'); const formData = require('form-data'); const mg = new Mailgun(formData).client({ username: 'api', key: process.env.MAILGUN_API_KEY });

nodemailer.initSnippet: const nodemailer = require('nodemailer'); const transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({ host: process.env.SMTP_HOST, port: process.env.SMTP_PORT, auth: { user: process.env.SMTP_USER, pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS } });
nodemailer.exampleSnippet: await transporter.sendMail({ from, to, subject, text });

stripe.initSnippet: const Stripe = require('stripe'); const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY);
stripe.exampleSnippet: const paymentIntent = await stripe.paymentIntents.create({ amount, currency: 'usd' });

openai.initSnippet: const OpenAI = require('openai'); const client = new OpenAI({ apiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY });
openai.exampleSnippet: const response = await client.chat.completions.create({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }] });

notion.initSnippet: const { Client } = require('@notionhq/client'); const notion = new Client({ auth: process.env.NOTION_API_KEY });
notion.exampleSnippet: const pages = await notion.databases.query({ database_id: databaseId });

airtable.initSnippet: const Airtable = require('airtable'); const base = new Airtable({ apiKey: process.env.AIRTABLE_API_KEY }).base(process.env.AIRTABLE_BASE_ID);

shopify.exampleSnippet: const client = new shopify.clients.Rest({ session }); const orders = await client.get({ path: 'orders' });

hubspot.initSnippet: const hubspot = require('@hubspot/api-client'); const client = new hubspot.Client({ accessToken: process.env.HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN });

twitter.initSnippet: const { TwitterApi } = require('twitter-api-v2'); const client = new TwitterApi({ appKey: process.env.TWITTER_API_KEY, appSecret: process.env.TWITTER_API_SECRET, accessToken: process.env.TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN, accessSecret: process.env.TWITTER_ACCESS_SECRET });

discord.initSnippet: const { Client, GatewayIntentBits } = require('discord.js'); const client = new Client({ intents: [GatewayIntentBits.Guilds, GatewayIntentBits.GuildMessages] });

linear.initSnippet: const { LinearClient } = require('@linear/sdk'); const linear = new LinearClient({ apiKey: process.env.LINEAR_API_KEY });
linear.exampleSnippet: const issues = await linear.issues(); const me = await linear.viewer;

todoist.initSnippet: const { TodoistApi } = require('@doist/todoist-api-typescript'); const api = new TodoistApi(process.env.TODOIST_API_TOKEN);

dropbox.initSnippet: const { Dropbox } = require('dropbox'); const dbx = new Dropbox({ accessToken: process.env.DROPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN });

spotify.initSnippet: const SpotifyWebApi = require('spotify-web-api-node'); const spotifyApi = new SpotifyWebApi({ clientId: process.env.SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID, clientSecret: process.env.SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET, refreshToken: process.env.SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN });
spotify.exampleSnippet: const data = await spotifyApi.refreshAccessToken(); spotifyApi.setAccessToken(data.body.access_token); await spotifyApi.play({ uris: [trackUri] });

supabase.initSnippet: const { createClient } = require('@supabase/supabase-js'); const supabase = createClient(process.env.SUPABASE_URL, process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);

firebase.initSnippet: const admin = require('firebase-admin'); admin.initializeApp({ credential: admin.credential.cert({ projectId: process.env.FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID, clientEmail: process.env.FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL, privateKey: process.env.FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY.replace(/\\n/g, '\n') }) });
firebase.exampleSnippet: const db = admin.firestore(); const doc = await db.collection('users').doc(userId).get();
